case_title: JEANETTA SCOTT VS. BILL WREN'S TOWING DBA ALL CARS & TIRES INC

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BILL WREN'S TOWING DBA ALL CARS & TIRES INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$30.00) SERVED APR-13-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BILL WREN'S TOWING DBA ALL CARS & TIRES INC
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF SCOTT, JEANETTA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SCOTT, JEANETTA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BILL WREN'S TOWING DBA ALL CARS & TIRES INC THE EVIDENCE WAS NOT SUFFICIENT TO ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT'S TRUCK OPERATOR CAUSED THE DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFF'S CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,053.79 FILED BY SCOTT, JEANETTA AS TO DEFENDANT BILL WREN'S TOWING DBA ALL CARS & TIRES INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-18-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
